function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0007
alias: helios_backfill_process_pack
issued_on: 2026-01-19
total_eur: 760
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 260
    line_eur: 260
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 110
    line_eur: 110
---
# Helios process pack invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0007                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_process_pack   |
| issued_on      | 2026-01-19                     |
| total_eur      | 760                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit  | 1   | 260      | 260      |
| 2 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 3 | staff follow-up support            | 1   | 110      | 110      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 760      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the middle phase when the work started looking like an actual office deliverable set.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request. I OCR-structured 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md by adding invoice YAML frontmatter per schema, preserved the original note body verbatim below the frontmatter, and removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system before task work, read relevant workflow+schema docs for OCR/frontmatter migration, preserved original body text, kept diff focused, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR-structure the specified invoice note. The target file visibly contained all required invoice schema fields and line items; those were extracted into frontmatter exactly per finance-record-frontmatter.md, with body preserved unchanged beneath. Workflow process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox AGENTS require deleting the inbox item after successful completion, which was done.
